steps.title: Find the cause‑effect clue
steps.content: The first clause describes the plant absorbing and storing chromium; the second clause notes that chromium concentrations in the soil decrease, indicating that the decrease results from the absorption.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Accordingly signals a result or consequence, fitting the signal that the drop in soil chromium follows the plant’s uptake.
The other three either add information, contrast, or specify, none of which show cause‑effect.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
